cliExtensions.description: Expo: manage connected SQLite databases. Use this tool to list registered databases, execute SQL queries, and inspect database schemas. Be careful about executing SQL queries, as they can modify or delete data.

commands.name: execute_query
commands.title: Execute a SQL query on a SQLite database

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the database to get details for

commands.name: list_tables
commands.title: List tables in a SQLite database

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the database to list tables for

commands.name: get_table_schema
commands.title: Get the schema of a table in a SQLite database

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the database to get the table schema for

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The name of the table to get the schema for
